transcript:
2024-03-02 19:14 - Maya: I still cannot believe the bookstore put us on the same trivia team.
2024-03-02 19:16 - Ari: Best wrong table I ever chose. Can I call you tomorrow?
2024-04-07 21:00 - Ari: I like where this is going, but I do not want to rush you.
2024-04-07 21:03 - Maya: Keep showing up. That is enough for now.
2024-05-20 22:11 - Maya: What happens when your internship ends?
2024-05-20 22:13 - Ari: We are still us. I promise I will take you to Kyoto when the distance ends.
2024-07-14 18:20 - Ari: I do not want to call this almost-anything anymore. Will you be my girlfriend?
2024-07-14 18:22 - Maya: Yes. Dating, officially, even if you asked beside a broken vending machine.
2024-09-01 20:05 - Maya: Sunday can be ours. Let us watch Attack on Titan together, one episode every call.
2024-09-01 20:07 - Ari: Promise. No watching ahead, and no cancelling without calling first.
2024-11-23 23:01 - Maya: You disappeared tonight and I felt foolish waiting.
2024-11-23 23:09 - Ari: I am sorry. I called, moved the train, and I am here now. Repair one: I will warn you sooner.
2025-01-18 17:40 - Ari: I got the Berlin placement. Sixteen months is longer than we planned.
2025-01-18 17:43 - Maya: Then Kyoto waits. Deferred is not forgotten.
2025-03-30 22:06 - Maya: We fought about whose turn it was to travel.
2025-03-30 22:17 - Ari: Repair two: I booked May and made a shared calendar so the work is visible.
2025-06-12 20:30 - Ari: My flight was cancelled and I snapped at you.
2025-06-12 20:44 - Maya: Repair three: we paused, called back, and listened without scoring points.
2025-08-03 21:15 - Maya: Six Sunday calls, six episodes, and neither of us watched ahead.
2025-08-03 21:18 - Ari: Attack on Titan promise kept. Tiny traditions count.
2025-09-05 19:12 - Maya: Berlin starts Monday. I think this is our long-distance chapter now.
2025-09-05 19:15 - Ari: Long Distance, not less together. Kyoto stays deferred until we share a home base.
2025-10-04 23:20 - Maya: You cancelled our call by text after I had waited all evening.
2025-10-04 23:23 - Ari: I broke our no-cancelling-without-calling promise. No excuse.
2025-10-05 00:02 - Ari: Repair four: I called before bed, apologized, and rescheduled for breakfast.
2025-10-05 00:05 - Maya: I accept the repair. Please do it before I have to chase you next time.
2025-10-18 10:10 - Maya: Today you called before changing our plan. That felt different.
2025-10-18 10:12 - Ari: Repair five: the calling promise is repaired, Kyoto is deferred, and our Sunday anime promise is kept.
2026-01-09 18:41 - Ari: I missed your exhibition opening and I know the video call was not the same.
2026-01-09 18:55 - Maya: Repair six: you sent the recording to my parents and booked the next opening in your calendar.
2026-05-28 22:00 - Maya: We argued about money for the move. I was scared, not angry at you.
2026-05-28 22:12 - Ari: Repair seven: shared budget, no surprise deposits, and we decide together.
2026-09-17 16:30 - Ari: The Berlin placement ends in December. Should we look for one apartment?
2026-09-17 16:34 - Maya: Yes. I am ready for the living-together plan, not just airport goodbyes.
2026-12-21 14:08 - Maya: We signed the lease. Long Distance ends when the keys arrive.
2026-12-21 14:10 - Ari: Next chapter: Living Together. Also, I saved the Kyoto envelope.
2027-01-15 09:30 - Ari: First breakfast in our apartment and only one mug survived the move.
2027-01-15 09:33 - Maya: I am home sounds better than call me when you land.
2027-02-10 20:20 - Maya: Kyoto tickets are booked for March. Is this really happening?
2027-02-10 20:22 - Ari: The promise followed us through every airport. Yes, it is happening.
2027-03-01 11:05 - Ari: We nearly missed the connection and did not turn it into a fight.
2027-03-01 11:09 - Maya: The seven repairs taught us how to pause before making each other the problem.
2027-03-12 07:45 - Maya: We are under the Kyoto station clock together.
2027-03-12 07:47 - Ari: Kyoto promise fulfilled. Future flirtation became a shared commitment.
2027-04-02 19:00 - Maya: Back home, Sunday still means one episode and no watching ahead.
2027-04-02 19:03 - Ari: Some promises become traditions instead of endings.
2027-06-18 21:22 - Ari: I had to cancel dinner, so I called before you left work.
2027-06-18 21:24 - Maya: The repaired calling promise is still something we carry forward.

supportedCheckins.text: We argued because Ari cancelled our call again
Ari called before bed and we rescheduled for breakfast
We finally arrived in Kyoto together
We watched the finale together without watching ahead
